author: doll-agent
content: Phase 1 main slice delivered: ~50 functions bound across creation, manipulation, and indexing. Code refactored into per-namespace modules (creation.rs, manipulation.rs, indexing.rs) with shared dispatch macros (match_dtype_all! / match_dtype_float!) in conv.rs. cargo clippy -D warnings clean. 116/116 pytest passing (90 new phase-1 + 26 phase-0 retained). One known marshalling-layer gap surfaced and split out: asfortranarray's F-contiguous flag is lost on the trip back through PyArray1::from_vec (issue #698 against ferray-numpy-interop). Phase-1 long tail is filed as #692-#697 for follow-up: from* family, grid builders (meshgrid/mgrid/ogrid/vander), extended manipulation (pad/tile/repeat/delete/insert/append/resize/trim_zeros), block/r_/c_/column_stack/row_stack, split family, and the take/choose/compress/select/place/putmask/extract group. Phase 2 (#687, ufunc + stats) is unblocked.
